title: macrotyloma daltonii
intro: Macrotyloma daltonii, also known as Pigeon Pea or Red Gram, is a perennial legume native to tropical Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Macrotyloma daltonii include its ability to reduce blood sugar levels, improve heart health, and provide antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of Macrotyloma daltonii include decoctions, infusions, and powder, which can be used to treat various health conditions, such as diabetes, fever, and digestive issues.
